title: cheirostylis ovata
intro: Cheirostylis ovata, also known as the ovate club-spur orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cheirostylis ovata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and reduce fever. Cheirostylis ovata can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
